entity.label: Almon
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Hidden, one of the sacerdotal cities of Benjamin (Josh. 21:18), called also Alemeth (1 Chr. 6:60).

nodes.label: Almon
nodes.description: Hidden, one of the sacerdotal cities of Benjamin (Josh. 21:18), called also Alemeth (1 Chr. 6:60).

verses.text: Anathoth with her suburbs, and Almon with her suburbs; four cities.
